Question:
We want to do a logistic regression analysis to study the association between UACR-SACR ratio and diabetic retinopathy. 
UACR-SACR ratio will be calculated as ((urinary albumin (ug/ml) divided by urinary creatinine (ug/ml)*1000)/ (serum albumin ALB (g/dL)/serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL))) and then categorized in quartiles in quartiles Q1: <=25%, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75%, Q4: >75%.
Diabetic retinopathy presence will be based on their response from diabetic retionopathy question, categorized as 1 and 0.
We will used AIREADI data from 2023-2025, and will exclude participants whose age were less than 20 years old, who didn't say yes when asked about diabetes diagnosis, missing status on diabetic retinopathy, missing serum albumin (ALB) (g/dL), serum creatinine (SCR) (mg/dL), urinary albumin (ug/ml), urinary creatinine (ug/ml).
for analysis, include the following covariates: age.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: logistic regression

Dataset: AIREADI

Period of Interest: 2023-2025

Inclusion Criteria:
- age >= 20
- diabetes diagnosis = Yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing status on diabetic retinopathy
- missing serum albumin ALB (g/dL)
- missing serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL)
- missing urinary albumin (ug/ml)
- missing urinary creatinine (ug/ml)

Covariates:
- age

Predictor:
- UACR-SACR ratio calculated as:
  ((urinary albumin (ug/ml) / urinary creatinine (ug/ml) * 1000) / (serum albumin ALB (g/dL) / serum creatinine SCR (mg/dL)))
  categorized into quartiles:
    Q1: <=25%
    Q2: >25 and <=50%
    Q3: >50 and <=75%
    Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- diabetic retinopathy presence = 1 if diabetic retionopathy question = Yes; 0 otherwise

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age", "age"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age AS
SELECT person_id, "age" AS "age"
FROM aireadi.participants;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age ON temp_master_age (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetes diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_type_ii_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_type_ii_diabetes AS
SELECT person_id, "type_ii_diabetes" AS "type_ii_diabetes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_type_ii_diabetes ON temp_master_type_ii_diabetes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetic retionopathy question", "status on diabetic retinopathy"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "serum albumin alb (g/dL)", "serum albumin alb (g/dL)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_albumin_g_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_albumin_g_dl AS
SELECT person_id, "albumin_g_dl" AS "albumin_g_dl"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_albumin_g_dl ON temp_master_albumin_g_dl (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "serum creatinine scr (mg/dL)", "serum creatinine scr (mg/dL)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl AS
SELECT person_id, "creatinine_mg_dl" AS "creatinine_mg_dl"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl ON temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "urinary albumin (ug/ml)", "urinary albumin (ug/ml)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml AS
SELECT person_id, "urine_albumin_ug_ml" AS "urine_albumin_ug_ml"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml ON temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "urinary creatinine (ug/ml)", "urinary creatinine (ug/ml)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml AS
SELECT person_id, "urine_creatinine_ug_ml" AS "urine_creatinine_ug_ml"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml ON temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml (person_id);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_age
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_type_ii_diabetes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_albumin_g_dl
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_person_id ON temp_all_ids (person_id);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.person_id,
    t0."age",
    t1."type_ii_diabetes",
    t2."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t3."albumin_g_dl",
    t4."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t5."urine_albumin_ug_ml",
    t6."urine_creatinine_ug_ml"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age t0 ON a.person_id = t0.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_type_ii_diabetes t1 ON a.person_id = t1.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes t2 ON a.person_id = t2.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_albumin_g_dl t3 ON a.person_id = t3.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t4 ON a.person_id = t4.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_urine_albumin_ug_ml t5 ON a.person_id = t5.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_urine_creatinine_ug_ml t6 ON a.person_id = t6.person_id;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_person_id    
    ON final_master_table (person_id);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age 20 or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with a diabetes diagnosis of 'Yes'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."type_ii_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing status on diabetic retinopathy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing serum albumin (ALB) (g/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."albumin_g_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing serum creatinine (SCR) (mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing urinary albumin (ug/ml)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."urine_albumin_ug_ml" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing urinary creatinine (ug/ml)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."urine_creatinine_ug_ml" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Covariate: age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."person_id",
       f."age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.2 Predictor: uacr_sacr_ratio
-- Calculate uacr-sacr ratio from inputs for cohort, handling division by zero
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_calculated AS
SELECT
    c."person_id",
    (
        (f."urine_albumin_ug_ml" / NULLIF(f."urine_creatinine_ug_ml", 0) * 1000.0)
        /
        NULLIF( (f."albumin_g_dl" / NULLIF(f."creatinine_mg_dl", 0)), 0)
    ) AS "uacr_sacr_ratio"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for uacr_sacr_ratio within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uacr_sacr_ratio") AS q3
FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_calculated
WHERE "uacr_sacr_ratio" IS NOT NULL; -- Only consider non-null values for cutoffs

-- Assign uacr_sacr_ratio quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uacr_sacr_quartiles AS
SELECT
  r."person_id",
  CASE
    WHEN r."uacr_sacr_ratio" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."uacr_sacr_ratio" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <=25%'
    WHEN r."uacr_sacr_ratio" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) AND r."uacr_sacr_ratio" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25 and <=50%'
    WHEN r."uacr_sacr_ratio" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) AND r."uacr_sacr_ratio" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50 and <=75%'
    WHEN r."uacr_sacr_ratio" > (SELECT q3 FROM temp_uacr_sacr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q4: >75%'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "uacr_sacr_ratio"
FROM temp_uacr_sacr_ratio_calculated r;

-- 4.3 Outcome: diabetic_retinopathy_presence
-- Map diabetic retinopathy presence to binary (1 or 0)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diabetic_retinopathy_presence AS
SELECT
  c."person_id",
  CASE f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes"
    WHEN 'Yes' THEN 1
    WHEN 'No' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "diabetic_retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."person_id",
  a."age",
  p."uacr_sacr_ratio",
  o."diabetic_retinopathy_presence"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age a ON c."person_id" = a."person_id"
JOIN temp_uacr_sacr_quartiles p ON c."person_id" = p."person_id"
JOIN temp_diabetic_retinopathy_presence o ON c."person_id" = o."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("person_id")
    outcome_vars <- c("diabetic_retinopathy_presence")
    
    cohort <- df


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["diabetic_retinopathy_presence"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_

    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))

    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L

    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L

    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))

    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }

    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)

    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))

    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }

    df[[outcome_var]] <- y

    # Must contain both 0 and 1 somewhere (plus NA allowed)
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }

    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
                
    
        
    
    model <- glm(formula,
                data = df,
                family =  binomial(link = "logit"))
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
        select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)
